verification_summary: All major claims verified. One date correction needed.

verified_claims.claim: Five TBM Avenger torpedo bombers departed Fort Lauderdale on December 5, 1945
verified_claims.notes: Exact date and aircraft type confirmed

verified_claims.claim: A Martin Mariner search plane with 13 crew also disappeared
verified_claims.notes: SS Gaines Mills reported witnessing an explosion consistent with the Mariner

twist_reveal_sources: Navy Board of Investigation amendment records
